description_long: This is a large, L-shaped office desk with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a wide, flat work surface and sturdy panel legs. The desk is accompanied by a swivel office chair with a cushioned backrest and seat, as well as a computer setup that includes a monitor, keyboard, and a small desktop unit. The surface of the desk is smooth and matte, with a dark gray finish that gives it a professional appearance. The L-shape provides ample workspace for multitasking or collaborative work, and the open leg space allows for comfortable seating and movement. The desk appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or laminate, with metal or plastic components for the chair and computer equipment. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or cable management features attached to the desk itself.
description: A large, L-shaped modern office desk with a swivel chair and computer setup, finished in dark gray with a smooth, matte surface. The design is minimalist and functional, offering ample workspace and open legroom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shaped desk, office chair, and computer monitor facing forward, highlighting the main workspace.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the desk, the position of the chair, and the computer setup on the main surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chair and monitor, as well as the open leg space beneath the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended L-section and the arrangement of the computer and chair from the side.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the inner corner of the L-shape, where the chair and computer are positioned, with the longer section extending to the user's left.
